name: Purple Innovation, Inc.
business: Purple offers a variety of innovative, branded and premium comfort products, including mattresses, pillows, cushions, bases, sheets and more. It markets and sells products via its direct-to-consumer channel and wholesale channel through retail brick-and-mortar and online wholesale partners. The company's products are based on proprietary Hyper-Elastic Polymer gel technology.

exposures.sentence: We offer a variety of innovative, branded and premium comfort products, including mattresses, pillows, cushions, bases, sheets and more.
Our e-commerce distribution channel is a critical hub for consumer education and consumer engagement, as well as conversion.
we designed and produced our own manufacturing equipment including our proprietary and patented molding machinery.

catalysts.sentence: In owned retail, we plan to open seven new stores this year following the closure of four underperforming stores last year, reflecting a disciplined approach to fleet optimization.
